title: Event status chip
description: Compact HeroUI `Chip` showing an Event's lifecycle status with color-coded variant. Rendered in event list, event-picker inline row, and event detail header. Variant map: draft=neutral, announced=info, registration_open=accent, registration_closed=warning, in_progress=success, completed=neutral, cancelled=danger, archived=neutral.

variant.$expr: ({ draft: 'neutral', announced: 'info', registration_open: 'accent', registration_closed: 'warning', in_progress: 'success', completed: 'neutral', cancelled: 'danger', archived: 'neutral' })[props.status]

children.$expr: ({ draft: 'Draft', announced: 'Announced', registration_open: 'Registration open', registration_closed: 'Registration closed', in_progress: 'In progress', completed: 'Completed', cancelled: 'Cancelled', archived: 'Archived' })[props.status]
